steps.prompt: Which word is the main verb?

hints.Quibus: 'Quibus' is a relative adjective meaning 'which (all these)'

reveal.gloss: I will provide for / take care of

hints.Present indicative: Present would be 'provideo' — 'providebo' with -ebo ending is future
hints.Present subjunctive: Present subjunctive would be 'provideam' — 'providebo' is future indicative
hints.Future perfect indicative: Future perfect would be 'providero' — 'providebo' is simple future

hints.video, videre, vidi, visum: These are the parts of 'videre' (to see) — the base verb
hints.prohibeo, prohibere, prohibui, prohibitu: These are the parts of 'prohibere' (to prevent)
hints.procedo, procedere, processi, processum: These are the parts of 'procedere' (to proceed)

hints.Nominative: Nominative plural would be 'res' — 'rebus' is dative/ablative; with 'providere' it is dative
hints.Accusative: Accusative plural would be 'res' — 'rebus' is dative (providere + dative = provide for)
hints.Ablative: 'rebus' can be ablative, but 'providere' takes dative for what is provided for

hints.1st: 1st declension dative plural ends in -is — 'res, rei' is 5th declension
hints.3rd: 3rd declension dative plural ends in -ibus — 'res, rei' with dat. pl. 'rebus' is 5th
hints.4th: 4th declension dative plural ends in -ibus — 'res, rei' is 5th declension

hints.Nominative: Nominative plural looks the same, but Cicero is addressing the citizens directly
hints.Accusative: Accusative looks the same for this noun, but the context is direct address

steps.prompt: What does Cicero promise with this closing statement?
steps.target: Personal responsibility for managing all aspects of the crisis
choices: Personal responsibility for managing all aspects of the crisis
He will consult the senate first

hints.He will resign his office: 'providebo' is a promise of action, not withdrawal
hints.He will consult the senate first: 'providebo' (I will provide for) claims personal initiative, not deference
hints.He will flee Rome: The opposite — Cicero pledges to stay and manage the crisis

translation: For all these matters, Citizens, I will provide.
